title: Leo Kadanoff
body: Leo Philip Kadanoff (January 14, 1937 – October 26, 2015) was an American physicist. He was a professor of physics (emeritus from 2004) at the University of Chicago and a former president of the American Physical Society (APS).  He contributed to the fields of statistical physics, chaos theory, and theoretical condensed matter physics.
